title: Kids&Youth English Teacher (International Curriculum / Exam Preparation)
description:
ULC Academy is a professional education institution in Singapore, providing high-quality English and academic programs for children and teenagers. We are currently looking for passionate and qualified Kids&Youth English Teacher to join our teaching team.

The successful candidate will be responsible for delivering engaging and effective English lessons aligned with international school curricula and/or international examinations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Teach English to students aged approximately 4-18 years old

  • Deliver lessons based on international school curricula and/or exam-oriented programs

  • Prepare students for international English and academic examinations, including but not limited to:

    • Cambridge English (KET, PET)

    • TOEFL Junior

    • SSAT

    • IB English (MYP / DP)

  • Design lesson plans, teaching materials, and assessments aligned with course objectives

  • Monitor students’ progress and provide regular academic feedback to students and parents

  • Maintain a positive, professional, and student-centered classroom environment

  • Participate in academic meetings, training, and curriculum development when required

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or above (Education, English, Linguistics or related fields preferred)

  • Relevant teaching experience in international school programs or exam preparation is strongly preferred

  • Familiarity with one or more of the following is an advantage:

    • KET / PET

    • TOEFL Junior

    • SSAT

    • IB English

  • Excellent command of spoken and written English

  • Strong classroom management and communication skills

  • Passion for teaching teenagers and supporting student growth

  • Candidates must be legally eligible to work in Singapore

Preferred Qualifications

  • Teaching experience in international schools or established training institutions

  • TESOL / TEFL / CELTA or equivalent teaching certification

  • Experience teaching IB curriculum (MYP / DP)

  • Ability to teach both general English and academic English

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary package (commensurate with experience and qualifications)

  • Structured curriculum and teaching support

  • Professional development and training opportunities

  • Friendly, supportive, and international working environment

  • Opportunities for long-term career development

postedCompany.description:
About ULC Academy

Located in the heart of Orchard Road, ULC Academy is a premier language training institution dedicated to helping learners of all ages build real-world language confidence in a supportive, engaging environment.

We specialize in English programmes designed for both adults and young learners, offering a wide range of classes that cater to diverse goals and learning needs — from exam-focused preparation (IELTS, TOEFL, Cambridge English) to non-exam conversational courses for personal growth and professional development.

Whether you're preparing for university admission, looking to advance your career, or simply aiming to feel more confident in everyday conversations, our experienced team of educators is here to guide you every step of the way.

In addition to English, ULC Academy also offers Japanese, French, Spanish, and Chinese language programmes, taught by native or highly qualified instructors — all in a welcoming atmosphere right at the center of Singapore’s most vibrant shopping and business district.

Join our community of global learners and take the next step in your language journey with ULC Academy.
postedCompany.name: ULC ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
